source: Item 17 chart + targeted FA/DA section reads

franchise_agreement.site_selection: Franchisee responsible; franchisor must accept site; 60-90 day approval
franchise_agreement.construction: Must meet franchisor Standards and specifications; no deviations without written approval

non_curable: Three-strikes rule (3+ same/similar defaults in 12 months)

insurance.property: All risk including flood and earthquake
insurance.additional_insureds: Franchisor, owners, affiliates including Inspire Brands Inc.

franchise_agreement.indemnification: Franchisee must indemnify franchisor for claims/liabilities relating to Restaurant or Premises
franchise_agreement.modification: Only in writing except franchisor can modify System/Manuals/Standards/Marks

development_agreement.territory: Limited protection within Development Area during term
development_agreement.development_schedule: Must open minimum restaurants per schedule
development_agreement.renewal: Available if development obligations met + criteria to expand + new schedule agreed

state_overrides: Maryland — excludes Maryland Franchise Law claims
North Dakota — excludes ND Franchise Investment Law claims

clause_walk_status: partial — headline terms from Item 17 chart and targeted section reads; full operative clause-by-clause walk of C-1 not completed
